name: zfmv_script_cleanup
description: zFMV_Script::Cleanup frees the FMV path and resets/destroys all queued actions.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 16 unmasked mismatches after masking 8 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 36 bytes and the VC object body is 48 bytes with 13 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
Reviewed drift is limited to branch/call byte layout around imported free and the Reset call; the source behavior matches the BN cleanup sequence.
The native smoke covers path free/nulling, action destruction through Reset(1), list clearing, and scalar-deleting destructor flags.
